notes: Unified dark teal cyber-ecology palette with cyan green player elements, blue/purple AI accents, and magenta elite warnings.
Generated as atlas/sheet source art. Keep real UI text rendered by Godot, not baked into images.
Use slicing or region resources before wiring into scenes.

assets.name: ui_kit_atlas
assets.purpose: HUD panels, meters, buttons, modal frames, settings controls, upgrade cards, minimap frame

assets.name: gameplay_sprites_atlas
assets.purpose: Player snake, AI snakes, elite snake, food seeds, shield rings, boost puffs, particles

assets.name: environment_tiles_atlas
assets.purpose: Grid floors, boundary strips, eco rocks, plants, lava edge, warning decals, elite spawn ring

assets.name: upgrade_icons_atlas
assets.purpose: Icon-only upgrade symbols for run draft cards and status chips

assets.name: menu_backgrounds_sheet
assets.purpose: Main menu, pause, game over, and settings background compositions
